narrative:
Mayfield Village-03-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 729 registered voters, with 51.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.3%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.7 percentage points.
